TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Staynan Simpu == Staynan Simpu (Toic: Dominik Stener, 'Amis: Ka'ongto, 1916-2002.3), masofoc i Switzerland, o nano Paylen Tintokiwkay a Simpu, halafin ko kaitira ningra i Singko, Kakacawan no Posong mipatenak to Ratoh, sa'ayaway patireng to pihopedan kociwsiya itini pasawali no Kalingko Posong, saka mapadama mapalowad ko i niyaro'ay mihopeday pinangan. Rayray no 'orip. I 1916 miheca, masofoc i Switzerland ci Staynan Simpu, 27 mihecaan mapatireng mala Simpu, ikor no 3 miheca, maocor cingra tayra i Congko paternak to 4 miheca, saan tayra i Amilika, Dipong 9 miheca, nanoya tayni i Taywan itira i Tawu i Posong kowan Tasi a Tinsokiway 3 miheca . Nikatayni ni Singko ci Staynan Simpu i, citodong i Pasongan, Kinanoka, Cidatayay, Ta'eman, Sa'aniwan a niyaro' patenak to Ratoh . I 1963 miheca, katahira ningra i niyaro' no Sa'aniwan itiya i, ciriko' cingra to losid no 'Amis a mikerid to Misa, mafaheka ko 'alomanay ato roma Simpu ato Siwni koni a demak . Saki niyaro'ay a finawlan, onini a Simpu sacingisngis sa, mingitid to 'ongto, pasowal to "Tingcupawyu" sa ko licay to 'alomanay, o kaemangay wawa maolah mitataroh to ngisngis ningra . Awaay ko maamaan i kamaro'an ningra, masadak sa rakat saan, to romi'ami'ad itira cingra i tatihi no kiwkay Paloma to datadateng . Pasifana'en ningra ko salikaka mipaloma to dating, saka 'eca pi'aca i Payrang mila'om to payso . O kapot mifalic to "Fangcalay cudad" pala no Loma tilid 'Amis a sowal ci Lifok 'Oteng, sacisowal sa, ci Staynan Simpu mikihatiya i saki lakakawa 'orip no 'Amis, mikihatiya romadiw, makero, maliepah, mitamako, o kamatini ningra, madoedo no kasaniyaro' midotoc to ponka, micowat a mapakadofah . Mapalasawad ni Staynan Simpu ko cilisinan sanay no 'Amis, mipadang palowad to piilisin no niyaro' Itiyaay kiwkay no Sa'aniwan, mararid makari'ang no faliyos, mafiyol kopipatenak, saka kareteng ko sapifadic to kiwkay a payso, cango'ot ko kicay no 'Amis a salikaka, miti'er cingra to itiraay i Switzerland, New Zealand a tatosaay fa'inayan ato tatoloay fafahiyan a salikaka ningra to padamso sapipatireng, roma pitoay kiwkay pakayni pasadak no salawina a salikaka ningra malaheci ko pipatireng . Ci Staynan Simpu o sarakatay patayni i saniyaro' no pasawali no 'Amis to a Simpu pihopedan kociwsiya. Mikapotay cingraan micikeroh to pihopedan kociwsiya ci Folaw Kolas (Lai Chunshui), sowal sa, i 1960 mihecaan, maledef i pasaetip no Taywan ko pihopedan kociwsiya, misafaloco' ci Staynan Simpu to sapipalowadaw itini i niyaro' no pasawali, nika malitemoh ko karorayan awaay ko mihepeday harateng no 'Amis itiya, orasaka mipili' cingra to papinapina tamdaw ato citodongay no kiwkay i kasaniyaro', keriden cangra patayra i malahiciay ko tayal to pihopedan kociwsiya saki a mihapinang minengneng . Itiya i 1965 miheca, Yisokay maocor ko Simpu ci Wang Deming, Du Hua ato salikaka ca Mou Wenxi ato Wu Qiulin sasepat tamdaw, mikihatiya to Asia syakay kicay i 'orip yofayof itira i Bangkok Thailand to kakeridan no syakay dademakay a sa'opo, nanoya sa'ayaw ko pidemak to pihopedan kociwsiya a onto . O kietecay a nanom ko sapingingoy i kato'asan 'orip ni Staynan Simpu, caay ka tayra isingan, tangasa 2001 miheca 5 folad minokay tayra i Switzerland pito'asan ningra a mipaising, saka 9 folad minokay tayni Sa'aniwan niyaro' . I 2003 miheca 3 folad, mapatay to kaciadada ningra to ka soot no faloco', itiya 28 romi'ad mipadongos cingraan, mararom ko finawlan no kasa niyaro' miliyok mimetmet to kamay ningra a tomangic . Matadem cingra i tatihi kiwkay no Sa'aniwan, toya mihaca malo pirarakatan a niyaro' sakowan no Singko . Sacisowal sa ko salikaka no niyaro' ci Huang Ruiling to tango'or ci Ka'ongtoan (Staynan Simpu), matiya o marohemay kafohongay kilang lonok sa matefad/mafonor i sera, itira i nikaomahan ningra a sera mada'oc a maleda', awaay ko kalala'edan to finawlan mida'oc a maro' . Pinengnengan.
S.PHON: == stajnan simpo~u~u == stajnan simpo~u~u (to~uiʦ: ɬ~ɮo~uminik stənər, ʡamis: kaʡo~uŋto~u, ****-****.*), maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u nano~u pajɾən tinto~ukiwkaj a simpo~u~u, ħaɾafin ko~u kaitira niŋra i siŋko~u, kakaʦawan no~u po~uso~uŋ mipatənak to~u rato~uħ, saʡajawaj patirəŋ to~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija itini pasawaɾi no~u kaɾiŋko~u po~uso~uŋ, saka mapaɬ~ɮama mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u i nijaro~uʡaj miħo~upəɬ~ɮaj pinaŋan. rajraj no~u ʡo~urip. i **** miħəʦa, maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u, ** miħəʦaan mapatirəŋ maɾa simpo~u~u, iko~ur no~u * miħəʦa, mao~uʦo~ur ʦiŋra tajra i ʦo~uŋko~u patərnak to~u * miħəʦa, saan tajra i amiɾika, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ * miħəʦa, nano~uja tajni i tajwan itira i tawo~u~u i po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan tasi a tinso~ukiwaj * miħəʦa . nikatajni ni siŋko~u ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u i, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i paso~uŋan, kinano~uka, ʦiɬ~ɮatajaj, taʡəman, saʡaniwan a nijaro~uʡ patənak to~u rato~uħ . i **** miħəʦa, kataħira niŋra i nijaro~uʡ no~u saʡaniwan itija i, ʦiriko~uʡ ʦiŋra to~u ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis a mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u misa, mafaħəka ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ato~u ro~uma simpo~u~u ato~u siwni ko~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak . saki nijaro~uʡaj a finawɾan, o~unini a simpo~u~u saʦiŋisŋis sa, miŋitiɬ~ɮ to~u ʡo~uŋto~u, paso~uwaɾ to~u "tiŋʦo~u~upawjo~u~u" sa ko~u ɾiʦaj to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, o~u kaəmaŋaj wawa mao~uɾaħ mitataro~uħ to~u ŋisŋis niŋra . awaaj ko~u maamaan i kamaro~uʡan niŋra, masaɬ~ɮak sa rakat saan, to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ itira ʦiŋra i tatiħi no~u kiwkaj paɾo~uma to~u ɬ~ɮataɬ~ɮatəŋ . pasifanaʡən niŋra ko~u saɾikaka mipaɾo~uma to~u ɬ~ɮatiŋ, saka ʡəʦa piʡaʦa i pajraŋ miɾaʡo~um to~u pajso~u . o~u kapo~ut mifaɾiʦ to~u "faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ" paɾa no~u ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʡamis a so~uwaɾ ʦi ɾifo~uk ʡo~utəŋ, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa, ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u mikiħatija i saki ɾakakawa ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis, mikiħatija ro~umaɬ~ɮiw, makəro~u, maɾiəpaħ, mitamako~u, o~u kamatini niŋra, maɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u kasanijaro~uʡ miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u po~unka, miʦo~uwat a mapakaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ . mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ni stajnan simpo~u~u ko~u ʦiɾisinan sanaj no~u ʡamis, mipaɬ~ɮaŋ paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u piiɾisin no~u nijaro~uʡ itijaaj kiwkaj no~u saʡaniwan, marariɬ~ɮ makariʡaŋ no~u faɾijo~us, mafijo~uɾ ko~upipatənak, saka karətəŋ ko~u sapifaɬ~ɮiʦ to~u kiwkaj a pajso~u, ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u kiʦaj no~u ʡamis a saɾikaka, mitiʡər ʦiŋra to~u itiraaj i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a tato~usaaj faʡinajan ato~u tato~uɾo~uaj fafaħijan a saɾikaka niŋra to~u paɬ~ɮamso~u sapipatirəŋ, ro~uma pito~uaj kiwkaj pakajni pasaɬ~ɮak no~u saɾawina a saɾikaka niŋra maɾaħəʦi ko~u pipatirəŋ . ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u o~u sarakataj patajni i sanijaro~uʡ no~u pasawaɾi no~u ʡamis to~u a simpo~u~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija. mikapo~utaj ʦiŋraan miʦikəro~uħ to~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija ʦi fo~uɾaw ko~uɾas (ɾai ʦħo~u~unsħo~u~ui), so~uwaɾ sa, i **** miħəʦaan, maɾəɬ~ɮəf i pasaətip no~u tajwan ko~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija, misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u to~u sapipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaw itini i nijaro~uʡ no~u pasawaɾi, nika maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u karo~urajan awaaj ko~u miħəpəɬ~ɮaj ħaratəŋ no~u ʡamis itija, o~urasaka mipiɾiʡ ʦiŋra to~u papinapina tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u kiwkaj i kasanijaro~uʡ, kəriɬ~ɮən ʦaŋra patajra i maɾaħiʦiaj ko~u tajaɾ to~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija saki a miħapinaŋ minəŋnəŋ . itija i **** miħəʦa, jiso~ukaj mao~uʦo~ur ko~u simpo~u~u ʦi waŋ ɬ~ɮəmiŋ, ɬ~ɮo~u~u ħo~u~ua ato~u saɾikaka ʦa mo~uo~u~u wənxi ato~u wo~u~u *io~u~uɾin sasəpat tamɬ~ɮaw, mikiħatija to~u asia sjakaj kiʦaj i ʡo~urip jo~ufajo~uf itira i b~b~vaŋko~uk tħaiɾanɬ~ɮ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u sjakaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj a saʡo~upo~u, nano~uja saʡajaw ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija a o~unto~u . o~u kiətəʦaj a nano~um ko~u sapiŋiŋo~uj i kato~uʡasan ʡo~urip ni stajnan simpo~u~u, ʦaaj ka tajra isiŋan, taŋasa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj tajra i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ pito~uʡasan niŋra a mipaisiŋ, saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj tajni saʡaniwan nijaro~uʡ . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, mapataj to~u kaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa niŋra to~u ka so~uo~ut no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, itija ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mipaɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us ʦiŋraan, mararo~um ko~u finawɾan no~u kasa nijaro~uʡ miɾijo~uk mimətmət to~u kamaj niŋra a to~umaŋiʦ . mataɬ~ɮəm ʦiŋra i tatiħi kiwkaj no~u saʡaniwan, to~uja miħaʦa maɾo~u pirarakatan a nijaro~uʡ sako~uwan no~u siŋko~u . saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ko~u saɾikaka no~u nijaro~uʡ ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ ro~u~uiɾiŋ to~u taŋo~uʡo~ur ʦi kaʡo~uŋto~uan (stajnan simpo~u~u), matija o~u maro~uħəmaj kafo~uħo~uŋaj kiɾaŋ ɾo~uno~uk sa matəfaɬ~ɮ/mafo~uno~ur i səra, itira i nikao~umaħan niŋra a səra maɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a maɾəɬ~ɮaʡ, awaaj ko~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮan to~u finawɾan miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a maro~uʡ . pinəŋnəŋan.
S.FORM: == Staynan Simpu == Staynan Simpu (Toic: Dominik Stener, 'Amis: Ka'ongto, 1916-2002.3), masofoc i Switzerland, o nano Paylen Tintokiwkay a Simpu, halafin ko kaitira ningra i Singko, Kakacawan no Posong mipatenak to Ratoh, sa'ayaway patireng to pihopedan kociwsiya itini pasawali no Kalingko Posong, saka mapadama mapalowad ko i niyaro'ay mihopeday pinangan. Rayray no 'orip. I 1916 miheca, masofoc i Switzerland ci Staynan Simpu, 27 mihecaan mapatireng mala Simpu, ikor no 3 miheca, maocor cingra tayra i Congko paternak to 4 miheca, saan tayra i Amilika, Dipong 9 miheca, nanoya tayni i Taywan itira i Tawu i Posong kowan Tasi a Tinsokiway 3 miheca . Nikatayni ni Singko ci Staynan Simpu i, citodong i Pasongan, Kinanoka, Cidatayay, Ta'eman, Sa'aniwan a niyaro' patenak to Ratoh . I 1963 miheca, katahira ningra i niyaro' no Sa'aniwan itiya i, ciriko' cingra to losid no 'Amis a mikerid to Misa, mafaheka ko 'alomanay ato roma Simpu ato Siwni koni a demak . Saki niyaro'ay a finawlan, onini a Simpu sacingisngis sa, mingitid to 'ongto, pasowal to "Tingcupawyu" sa ko licay to 'alomanay, o kaemangay wawa maolah mitataroh to ngisngis ningra . Awaay ko maamaan i kamaro'an ningra, masadak sa rakat saan, to romi'ami'ad itira cingra i tatihi no kiwkay Paloma to datadateng . Pasifana'en ningra ko salikaka mipaloma to dating, saka 'eca pi'aca i Payrang mila'om to payso . O kapot mifalic to "Fangcalay cudad" pala no Loma tilid 'Amis a sowal ci Lifok 'Oteng, sacisowal sa, ci Staynan Simpu mikihatiya i saki lakakawa 'orip no 'Amis, mikihatiya romadiw, makero, maliepah, mitamako, o kamatini ningra, madoedo no kasaniyaro' midotoc to ponka, micowat a mapakadofah . Mapalasawad ni Staynan Simpu ko cilisinan sanay no 'Amis, mipadang palowad to piilisin no niyaro' Itiyaay kiwkay no Sa'aniwan, mararid makari'ang no faliyos, mafiyol kopipatenak, saka kareteng ko sapifadic to kiwkay a payso, cango'ot ko kicay no 'Amis a salikaka, miti'er cingra to itiraay i Switzerland, New Zealand a tatosaay fa'inayan ato tatoloay fafahiyan a salikaka ningra to padamso sapipatireng, roma pitoay kiwkay pakayni pasadak no salawina a salikaka ningra malaheci ko pipatireng . Ci Staynan Simpu o sarakatay patayni i saniyaro' no pasawali no 'Amis to a Simpu pihopedan kociwsiya. Mikapotay cingraan micikeroh to pihopedan kociwsiya ci Folaw Kolas (Lai Chunshui), sowal sa, i 1960 mihecaan, maledef i pasaetip no Taywan ko pihopedan kociwsiya, misafaloco' ci Staynan Simpu to sapipalowadaw itini i niyaro' no pasawali, nika malitemoh ko karorayan awaay ko mihepeday harateng no 'Amis itiya, orasaka mipili' cingra to papinapina tamdaw ato citodongay no kiwkay i kasaniyaro', keriden cangra patayra i malahiciay ko tayal to pihopedan kociwsiya saki a mihapinang minengneng . Itiya i 1965 miheca, Yisokay maocor ko Simpu ci Wang Deming, Du Hua ato salikaka ca Mou Wenxi ato Wu Qiulin sasepat tamdaw, mikihatiya to Asia syakay kicay i 'orip yofayof itira i Bangkok Thailand to kakeridan no syakay dademakay a sa'opo, nanoya sa'ayaw ko pidemak to pihopedan kociwsiya a onto . O kietecay a nanom ko sapingingoy i kato'asan 'orip ni Staynan Simpu, caay ka tayra isingan, tangasa 2001 miheca 5 folad minokay tayra i Switzerland pito'asan ningra a mipaising, saka 9 folad minokay tayni Sa'aniwan niyaro' . I 2003 miheca 3 folad, mapatay to kaciadada ningra to ka soot no faloco', itiya 28 romi'ad mipadongos cingraan, mararom ko finawlan no kasa niyaro' miliyok mimetmet to kamay ningra a tomangic . Matadem cingra i tatihi kiwkay no Sa'aniwan, toya mihaca malo pirarakatan a niyaro' sakowan no Singko . Sacisowal sa ko salikaka no niyaro' ci Huang Ruiling to tango'or ci Ka'ongtoan (Staynan Simpu), matiya o marohemay kafohongay kilang lonok sa matefad/mafonor i sera, itira i nikaomahan ningra a sera mada'oc a maleda', awaay ko kalala'edan to finawlan mida'oc a maro' . Pinengnengan.
S.PHON: == stajnan simpo~u~u == stajnan simpo~u~u (to~uiʦ: ɬ~ɮo~uminik stənər, ʡamis: kaʡo~uŋto~u, ****-****.*), maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u nano~u pajɾən tinto~ukiwkaj a simpo~u~u, ħaɾafin ko~u kaitira niŋra i siŋko~u, kakaʦawan no~u po~uso~uŋ mipatənak to~u rato~uħ, saʡajawaj patirəŋ to~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija itini pasawaɾi no~u kaɾiŋko~u po~uso~uŋ, saka mapaɬ~ɮama mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u i nijaro~uʡaj miħo~upəɬ~ɮaj pinaŋan. rajraj no~u ʡo~urip. i **** miħəʦa, maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u, ** miħəʦaan mapatirəŋ maɾa simpo~u~u, iko~ur no~u * miħəʦa, mao~uʦo~ur ʦiŋra tajra i ʦo~uŋko~u patərnak to~u * miħəʦa, saan tajra i amiɾika, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ * miħəʦa, nano~uja tajni i tajwan itira i tawo~u~u i po~uso~uŋ ko~uwan tasi a tinso~ukiwaj * miħəʦa . nikatajni ni siŋko~u ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u i, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i paso~uŋan, kinano~uka, ʦiɬ~ɮatajaj, taʡəman, saʡaniwan a nijaro~uʡ patənak to~u rato~uħ . i **** miħəʦa, kataħira niŋra i nijaro~uʡ no~u saʡaniwan itija i, ʦiriko~uʡ ʦiŋra to~u ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis a mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u misa, mafaħəka ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ato~u ro~uma simpo~u~u ato~u siwni ko~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak . saki nijaro~uʡaj a finawɾan, o~unini a simpo~u~u saʦiŋisŋis sa, miŋitiɬ~ɮ to~u ʡo~uŋto~u, paso~uwaɾ to~u "tiŋʦo~u~upawjo~u~u" sa ko~u ɾiʦaj to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, o~u kaəmaŋaj wawa mao~uɾaħ mitataro~uħ to~u ŋisŋis niŋra . awaaj ko~u maamaan i kamaro~uʡan niŋra, masaɬ~ɮak sa rakat saan, to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ itira ʦiŋra i tatiħi no~u kiwkaj paɾo~uma to~u ɬ~ɮataɬ~ɮatəŋ . pasifanaʡən niŋra ko~u saɾikaka mipaɾo~uma to~u ɬ~ɮatiŋ, saka ʡəʦa piʡaʦa i pajraŋ miɾaʡo~um to~u pajso~u . o~u kapo~ut mifaɾiʦ to~u "faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ" paɾa no~u ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʡamis a so~uwaɾ ʦi ɾifo~uk ʡo~utəŋ, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa, ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u mikiħatija i saki ɾakakawa ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis, mikiħatija ro~umaɬ~ɮiw, makəro~u, maɾiəpaħ, mitamako~u, o~u kamatini niŋra, maɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u kasanijaro~uʡ miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u po~unka, miʦo~uwat a mapakaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ . mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ni stajnan simpo~u~u ko~u ʦiɾisinan sanaj no~u ʡamis, mipaɬ~ɮaŋ paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u piiɾisin no~u nijaro~uʡ itijaaj kiwkaj no~u saʡaniwan, marariɬ~ɮ makariʡaŋ no~u faɾijo~us, mafijo~uɾ ko~upipatənak, saka karətəŋ ko~u sapifaɬ~ɮiʦ to~u kiwkaj a pajso~u, ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u kiʦaj no~u ʡamis a saɾikaka, mitiʡər ʦiŋra to~u itiraaj i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a tato~usaaj faʡinajan ato~u tato~uɾo~uaj fafaħijan a saɾikaka niŋra to~u paɬ~ɮamso~u sapipatirəŋ, ro~uma pito~uaj kiwkaj pakajni pasaɬ~ɮak no~u saɾawina a saɾikaka niŋra maɾaħəʦi ko~u pipatirəŋ . ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u o~u sarakataj patajni i sanijaro~uʡ no~u pasawaɾi no~u ʡamis to~u a simpo~u~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija. mikapo~utaj ʦiŋraan miʦikəro~uħ to~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija ʦi fo~uɾaw ko~uɾas (ɾai ʦħo~u~unsħo~u~ui), so~uwaɾ sa, i **** miħəʦaan, maɾəɬ~ɮəf i pasaətip no~u tajwan ko~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija, misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʦi stajnan simpo~u~u to~u sapipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaw itini i nijaro~uʡ no~u pasawaɾi, nika maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u karo~urajan awaaj ko~u miħəpəɬ~ɮaj ħaratəŋ no~u ʡamis itija, o~urasaka mipiɾiʡ ʦiŋra to~u papinapina tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u kiwkaj i kasanijaro~uʡ, kəriɬ~ɮən ʦaŋra patajra i maɾaħiʦiaj ko~u tajaɾ to~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija saki a miħapinaŋ minəŋnəŋ . itija i **** miħəʦa, jiso~ukaj mao~uʦo~ur ko~u simpo~u~u ʦi waŋ ɬ~ɮəmiŋ, ɬ~ɮo~u~u ħo~u~ua ato~u saɾikaka ʦa mo~uo~u~u wənxi ato~u wo~u~u *io~u~uɾin sasəpat tamɬ~ɮaw, mikiħatija to~u asia sjakaj kiʦaj i ʡo~urip jo~ufajo~uf itira i b~b~vaŋko~uk tħaiɾanɬ~ɮ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u sjakaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj a saʡo~upo~u, nano~uja saʡajaw ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħo~upəɬ~ɮan ko~uʦiwsija a o~unto~u . o~u kiətəʦaj a nano~um ko~u sapiŋiŋo~uj i kato~uʡasan ʡo~urip ni stajnan simpo~u~u, ʦaaj ka tajra isiŋan, taŋasa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj tajra i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ pito~uʡasan niŋra a mipaisiŋ, saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj tajni saʡaniwan nijaro~uʡ . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, mapataj to~u kaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa niŋra to~u ka so~uo~ut no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, itija ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mipaɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us ʦiŋraan, mararo~um ko~u finawɾan no~u kasa nijaro~uʡ miɾijo~uk mimətmət to~u kamaj niŋra a to~umaŋiʦ . mataɬ~ɮəm ʦiŋra i tatiħi kiwkaj no~u saʡaniwan, to~uja miħaʦa maɾo~u pirarakatan a nijaro~uʡ sako~uwan no~u siŋko~u . saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ko~u saɾikaka no~u nijaro~uʡ ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ ro~u~uiɾiŋ to~u taŋo~uʡo~ur ʦi kaʡo~uŋto~uan (stajnan simpo~u~u), matija o~u maro~uħəmaj kafo~uħo~uŋaj kiɾaŋ ɾo~uno~uk sa matəfaɬ~ɮ/mafo~uno~ur i səra, itira i nikao~umaħan niŋra a səra maɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a maɾəɬ~ɮaʡ, awaaj ko~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮan to~u finawɾan miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a maro~uʡ . pinəŋnəŋan.
